description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Release that triggers on published releases. The workflow should have two jobs: update-autorevision and update-archive. The update-autorevision job should run on ubuntu-latest, checkout the repository, generate an AutoRevision.txt file with git revision information, and commit the changes. The update-archive job should run on ubuntu-latest, depend on update-autorevision, checkout the repository, create a build directory, create tar.gz and zip archives of the repository, and upload them as release assets if the workflow is triggered by a tag.
